name: doc-build-index
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: nielsen-norman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: INDEX_DEPTH
required_inputs.description: How deep the parent/child docset should go.

required_inputs.name: INDEX_LAYOUT
required_inputs.description: Where the overview pages should live. Defaults to `in-place-readme` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: PARENT_ENTRY_STYLE
required_inputs.description: Parent-page style. Defaults to `readme-overview` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: CHILD_DOC_STYLE
required_inputs.description: Child-page style. Defaults to `project-info` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE
required_inputs.description: Primary audience for the resulting docset.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE_LEVEL
required_inputs.description: Difficulty level. Default is general-reader language when omitted.

required_inputs.name: EVIDENCE_LINKS
required_inputs.description: Extra files or sources that must be cited beyond the repo tree itself.
